title: Skate down a Rainbow to VIP!

original_paths: Skate down a Rainbow to VIP!.rbxl

source.name: Skate down a Rainbow to VIP! ™ - Please favorite!
source.description: Alright guys, im leaving roblox so this wont be updated, I apreciate all the support I got from you guys and I wont forget each and every one of you:) <3  INTRO: Like rainbows? like to skate? Well then  play this game! Thanks every one of the place visits I have. I would also apriciate it if you favorite this game. Oh, and people that say I used free models, I did not. I build everything from SCRATCH The only free models are the givers and a few ramps in skate park I built. If you like this game, try some of my other games, im sure you will like them. ;)-But overall.. Thanks :)
